tasks.label: Clean Build Caches (All Platforms)
tasks.command: find . \( -path './.git' -o -path './release' -o -path './README-IMG' \) -prune -o -type d \( -name bin -o -name obj \) -exec rm -rf {} + && rm -rf ~/Library/Developer/Xcode/DerivedData/* ~/Library/Caches/Xamarin/mtbs/builds/* && dotnet nuget locals temp --clear && dotnet nuget locals http-cache --clear

windows.command: adb logcat -c && dotnet build PhotoViewer.Android/PhotoViewer.Android.csproj -c Debug -t:Run -p:AndroidSdkDirectory=%LOCALAPPDATA%\Android\Sdk && adb logcat -s PhotoViewer:V AndroidRuntime:E mono:W monodroid:W

osx.command: ADB=$HOME/Library/Android/sdk/platform-tools/adb; "$ADB" kill-server && "$ADB" start-server && "$ADB" logcat -c && dotnet build PhotoViewer.Android/PhotoViewer.Android.csproj -c Debug && "$ADB" install -r PhotoViewer.Android/bin/Debug/net10.0-android/cc.xiaojh.PhotoViewer-Signed.apk && "$ADB" shell monkey -p cc.xiaojh.PhotoViewer -c android.intent.category.LAUNCHER 1 && "$ADB" logcat -s PhotoViewer:V AndroidRuntime:E mono:W monodroid:W

windows.command: adb install -r PhotoViewer.Android\bin\Debug\net10.0-android\cc.xiaojh.PhotoViewer-Signed.apk && adb shell monkey -p cc.xiaojh.PhotoViewer -c android.intent.category.LAUNCHER 1

osx.command: ADB=$HOME/Library/Android/sdk/platform-tools/adb; "$ADB" kill-server && "$ADB" start-server && "$ADB" install -r PhotoViewer.Android/bin/Debug/net10.0-android/cc.xiaojh.PhotoViewer-Signed.apk && "$ADB" shell monkey -p cc.xiaojh.PhotoViewer -c android.intent.category.LAUNCHER 1

tasks.label: Debug iOS Simulator
tasks.command: dotnet build PhotoViewer.iOS/PhotoViewer.iOS.csproj -c Debug -r iossimulator-arm64 && xcrun simctl install booted PhotoViewer.iOS/bin/Debug/net10.0-ios/iossimulator-arm64/PhotoViewer.iOS.app/ && xcrun simctl launch booted cc.xiaojh.PhotoViewer

tasks.label: Renew iOS Certificate
tasks.command: find ~/Library/MobileDevice/Provisioning\ Profiles/ -name '*.mobileprovision' -delete && dotnet build PhotoViewer.iOS/PhotoViewer.iOS.csproj -c Release -r ios-arm64 && xcrun devicectl device install app --device "${input:iosDevice}" PhotoViewer.iOS/bin/Release/net10.0-ios/ios-arm64/PhotoViewer.iOS.app && xcrun devicectl device process launch --device "${input:iosDevice}" cc.xiaojh.PhotoViewer

tasks.label: Debug iOS
tasks.command: dotnet build PhotoViewer.iOS/PhotoViewer.iOS.csproj -c Release -r ios-arm64 && xcrun devicectl device install app --device "${input:iosDevice}" PhotoViewer.iOS/bin/Release/net10.0-ios/ios-arm64/PhotoViewer.iOS.app && xcrun devicectl device process launch --device "${input:iosDevice}" cc.xiaojh.PhotoViewer

tasks.label: Install iOS
tasks.command: xcrun devicectl device install app --device "${input:iosDevice}" PhotoViewer.iOS/bin/Release/net10.0-ios/ios-arm64/PhotoViewer.iOS.app && xcrun devicectl device process launch --device "${input:iosDevice}" cc.xiaojh.PhotoViewer

tasks.label: Install iOS Stable (Release)
tasks.command: test -d release/ios-stable/PhotoViewer.iOS.app && xcrun devicectl device install app --device "${input:iosDevice}" release/ios-stable/PhotoViewer.iOS.app && xcrun devicectl device process launch --device "${input:iosDevice}" cc.xiaojh.PhotoViewer

tasks.label: Publish iOS IPA (Release)
tasks.command: APP_VERSION=$(sed -n 's:.*<AppVersion>\(.*\)</AppVersion>.*:\1:p' Directory.Build.props | head -n 1) && dotnet publish PhotoViewer.iOS/PhotoViewer.iOS.csproj -c Release -r ios-arm64 && mkdir -p release/ios-stable && rm -rf release/ios-stable/PhotoViewer.iOS.app release/ios-stable/PhotoViewer.iOS.ipa && cp -R PhotoViewer.iOS/bin/Release/net10.0-ios/ios-arm64/PhotoViewer.iOS.app release/ios-stable/PhotoViewer.iOS.app && cp PhotoViewer.iOS/bin/Release/net10.0-ios/ios-arm64/publish/PhotoViewer.iOS.ipa release/ios-stable/PhotoViewer.iOS.ipa && cp PhotoViewer.iOS/bin/Release/net10.0-ios/ios-arm64/publish/PhotoViewer.iOS.ipa "release/PhotoViewer-${APP_VERSION}-ios-arm64.ipa"

inputs.description: 选择要安装的 iOS 设备
